_comment: Klar client configuration. Edit before building (`npm run dist`) so the produced EXE points at your server and your update repo. This file is bundled into the EXE; runtime overrides are stored under userData/client-config.json after auto-update.
_serverUrlNote: Custom domain backed by Caddy + Let's Encrypt on the host machine. Friends never need to set KLAR_SERVER_URL. The dev-shell `tunnel` command (legacy localtunnel) still uses the tunnelSubdomain field below if you ever need a fallback path.
